'''Narg''' was an isolated [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Rayter sector/Legends|Rayter sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Its [[Human/Legends|Human]] inhabitants were known to be [[Speciesism|xenophobic]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the planet was controlled by [[TransGalMeg Industries, Incorporated]].

{{Planet-stub}}
